comment: Ordered build steps the lead agent works through. gate=true means stop and ask the human (visual quality, niche choice, money/credentials). The lead also reads MISSION.md/state.md; this is the machine-readable spine.

steps.title: Trades category visual sign-off
steps.ask: Review /preview/trades. Does it impress a real electrician/plumber? Approve to proceed, or redirect with specific design feedback.

steps.do: Build generator/index.ts. Prove a realistic GBP payload -> validated SiteProps for trades that PASSES grade.mjs. Flex the schema if real data needs it, then re-grade.

steps.title: Generation quality sign-off
steps.ask: Review a generated trades site (not the hand-authored example). Is the copy good enough to ship? Approve to mass-produce remaining categories, or redirect.

steps.do: Build allied-health category (AHPRA-compliant). Grade must pass.
Build beauty-aesthetics category (gallery + booking). Grade must pass.
Build fitness-wellness category (timetable + IG). Grade must pass.

steps.title: Remaining categories visual sign-off
steps.ask: Review the three new categories. Approve or redirect per category.

steps.do: Build funnel pages per customer-journey.md (landing, building, preview, customise, expired, welcome).

steps.title: Funnel feel sign-off
steps.ask: Review the funnel end to end. Approve or redirect.

steps.do: Write n8n workflow JSONs, supabase-schema.sql, deployment-checklist.md (specs only, no live calls).
Write what-human-must-do.md, then create autopilot/state/DONE and stop.
